headline: A Look At Dollar General (DG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Dollar General (DG) has drawn attention after a one-month return of a 23% decline and a past three-month return of an 11.7% decline, prompting investors to reassess the retailer’s current valuation and fundamentals. The company reports annual revenue of US$42.7b and net income of US$1.5b, with reported annual revenue growth of 4% and net income growth of 7%. These figures help frame expectations around profitability and scale. See our latest...
